---
title: "Metropolis-Hastings Algorithm"
description: "Visualize the Metropolis-Hastings algorithm, a Markov Chain Monte Carlo method for sampling from probability distributions."
date: "2025-01-03"
categories: [mcmc, statistics, algorithms]
image: "images/metropolis-hastings.svg"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← Return to Apps](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| cache: false
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

script_path = Path("metropolis hastings/metropolis_hastings_precompute.py")
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mh_precompute", script_path)
module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(module)
module.write_data("metropolis hastings/metropolis_hastings_data.json", max_n=500, runs_per_d=4)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  #quarto-content .content, main.content { max-width: min(1800px, 96vw) !important; }
  #quarto-margin-sidebar, nav#TOC, #TOC-container { display: none !important; }
  .controls { background:white; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .control-group { margin:10px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:15px; }
  .control-group label { min-width:200px; font-weight:500; }
  .control-group .value { min-width:80px; font-weight:bold; color:#2563eb; }
  svg { width:100%; background:white; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); margin-top:14px; }
  #mh-trace-svg, #mh-hist-svg { height: 320px; }
</style>

<div class="controls">
  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="d-slider">Proposal Width (d):</label>
    <input type="range" id="d-slider" min="0.5" max="6" step="0.5" value="2">
    <span class="value" id="d-value">2.0</span>
  </div>
  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="n-slider">Number of Samples:</label>
    <input type="range" id="n-slider" min="5" max="500" step="1" value="20">
    <span class="value" id="n-value">20</span>
  </div>
  <div class="control-group">
    <button id="resample-btn" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Resample</button>
  </div>
</div>

<svg id="mh-trace-svg"></svg>
<svg id="mh-hist-svg"></svg>

<div style="background:white; padding:18px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); margin-top:16px;">
  <h3>Statistics</h3>
  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:12px;">
    <div><div>Acceptance Rate</div><div id="stat-acceptance" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>Accepted / Total</div><div id="stat-accepted" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>Effective Sample Size</div><div id="stat-ess" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>Sample Mean</div><div id="stat-mean" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>Sample Std Dev</div><div id="stat-std" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
  import { initMetropolisHastingsApp } from './metropolis hastings/metropolis_hastings_d3_app.js';
  initMetropolisHastingsApp().catch((err) => console.error('Failed to initialize app:', err));
</script>
```
